intro: Hi! We're thrilled to offer you the SDE-1 role. The package is ₹12 LPA base, joining next month. What do you think?

n1.recruiter: We're offering ₹12 LPA base. Shall I send the paperwork?

choices.label: Thank you — I'm excited. Could we talk about the base? Based on my offers and the role's scope, I was hoping closer to ₹16 LPA.
That's too low. I need more.

n2.recruiter: I appreciate the enthusiasm. ₹16 is above our band for this level — the most I can flex on base is ₹13.5. Can we make that work?

choices.label: If base is capped, could we look at a joining bonus or an early review at 6 months to close the gap?

n2b.recruiter: I hear you. Help me make the case internally — what's driving the number?

choices.label: I have a competing offer at ₹15.5 and my system-design scores are strong for this role.

n3.recruiter: A ₹1L joining bonus plus a documented 6-month review is doable, landing you around ₹14.5 effective. Deal?

choices.label: That works — thank you for partnering on it. Let's proceed.
Can we also lock the review criteria in writing?

n3b.recruiter: I can't get to ₹16 at this level, and digging in here may stall things. Where can we find middle ground?

choices.label: Fair — could a joining bonus bridge it instead?

end_win_plus.title: Closed above band with terms in writing
